# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

build-test:
  stage: build

  image:
    name: ${BUILD_IMAGE}

  only:
    - branches
    - tags

  script:
    - mkdir -p $GIT_DIR/hooks && cp ./bin/* $GIT_DIR/hooks
    - git fetch --tags
    - bash -c './build.sh $GIT_DIR'

  services:
    - docker:dind

# The second stage must run on shared runner to leverage caching. This stage runs on Docker and runs build scripts.
build-production:
  extends: [build]
  
  image:
    name: ${BUILD_IMAGE}
    
  environment:
    name:
      value: production
    url:
      from_secret: PRODUCTION_URL

  environment:
    env:
      value: production
      from_secret: PRODUCTION_ENV
